scripts.test: dotnet test --verbosity normal && npm --prefix frontend run test:install && npm --prefix frontend test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: docker rm -f kalandra-temporal-e2e && docker run -d --name kalandra-temporal-e2e -p 7233:7233 temporalio/temporal:1.7.2 server start-dev --ip 0.0.0.0 --headless && supabase start && cross-env PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:5000 npm --prefix frontend run build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names backend,serve,test --prefix-colors blue,yellow,green "cd backend/src/Kalandra.Api && dotnet run" "wait-on http://localhost:5000/health && serve frontend/dist -l 4321" "wait-on http://localhost:5000/health && wait-on http://localhost:4321 && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e"
